nasb.text: Then he said, “Go, borrow vessels at large for yourself from all your neighbors, even empty vessels; do not get a few.

esv.text: Then he said, “Go outside, borrow vessels from all your neighbors, empty vessels and not too few.

cnv.text: 以利沙說：“你到外面去向你所有的鄰居借空器皿，要盡量多借。

ccb.text: 以利沙说：“你去向所有的邻居借空器皿，要尽量多借一些。
